title: Setting Up a Free Webflow Account

intro.text: We build your landing page in Webflow, a professional website builder. You'll need a free Webflow account so we can share the project with you and publish it to your subdomain. No credit card required.
bullets: We build your landing page inside your Webflow account so you own it
The free Starter plan is all you need to get started
We handle the setup and build once you have the account created
intro.helpText: If you have any troubles, feel free to email Tyce, or book a meeting directly

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Go to webflow.com/signup
steps.description: You can sign up with Google (fastest) or enter your work email address and click Continue.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Complete the signup form
steps.description: Fill in your name and create a password. Then verify your email address by clicking the link Webflow sends you.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Stay on the free Starter plan
steps.description: You do not need to upgrade or enter any payment details. The free Starter plan is all we need. If prompted to choose a plan, select "Starter" (Free).

steps.label: Step 4 (Final Step)
steps.title: Let us know your account is ready
steps.description: Once your account is created, let us know and we'll invite you to the project workspace. We'll handle everything from there.
